anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the route-observability mechanism supplies the public evidence boundary for trace routing while denying private transcript or live-session proof.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the route-observability mechanism supplies the public evidence boundary for trace routing while denying private transcript or live-session proof.

statement: Microcosm Agent Trace Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Agent Trace Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A recurring trace rule about manifest ids, route-observability refs, receipts, omissions, or authority ceilings belongs at the standard level.
The change must propagate through trace instances, validators, receipts, generated projections, and anti-claims without asserting private transcript coverage.
workflow: Prove the invariant from the standard, macro manifest refs, used-by organ rows, route-observability mechanism, receipt evidence, and generated health.
Update source standards, validators, receipts, generated projections, and focused checks together so the rule is computed and not asserted.
Leave unsupported private trace, live-session, provider, release, and whole-system correctness claims as explicit residual pressure.
